Done. Here's what was found and fixed:

**Root cause:** `terminal/server.py` had its own duplicate GitHub OAuth flow at `terminal.clung.us/login` and `terminal.clung.us/auth/github`. When a user visited `terminal.clung.us` unauthenticated, the middleware redirected them to `/login` — the wrong auth endpoint.

**Fix:** Changed line 221 of `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py` — the auth middleware now redirects to `https://clung.us/auth/github?next=<encoded-terminal-url>` instead of `/login`. This works...(truncated)
